sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: KMI 2025년 4분기 순이익 9억 9,600만 달러, 연간 순이익과 Adjusted EBITDA 모두 사상 최고

keyPoints.text: 2025년 4분기 순이익 9억 9,600만 달러(전년 동기 6억 6,700만 달러), EPS 0.45달러(+50%), Adjusted EPS 0.39달러(+22%), Adjusted EBITDA 22억 7,100만 달러(+10%)를 기록했다.
2025년 연간 기준 순이익과 Adjusted EBITDA 모두 사상 최고치를 달성했으며, 연간 EPS는 전년 대비 17%, Adjusted EPS는 13%, Adjusted EBITDA는 6% 상승했다.

riskChanges.text: 우크라이나 전쟁이 4년차에 접어드는 등 지정학적 리스크가 지속되고 있으나, 경영진은 미국의 LNG 수출 리더십을 통해 유럽 에너지 안보에 기여하고 있으며 fee-based 구조로 가격 변동성 노출이 제한적임을 강조했다.

businessChanges.text: 자연가스 수요는 2030년까지 17% 성장이 전망되며, KMI는 LNG 시설로 일 80억 입방피트(8 Bcf/d) 공급 장기계약을 보유하고 있으며 2028년말까지 12 Bcf/d로 확대될 전망이다.
데이터센터를 중심으로 전력 수요 증가가 예상되며, 전체 미래 데이터센터 전력 수요의 약 70%가 천연가스 발전에서 공급될 것으로 전망된다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 순이익 9억 9,600만 달러, Adjusted EBITDA 22억 7,100만 달러 기록.
분기 영업현금흐름 17억 달러, FCF(자본지출 차감 후) 9억 달러 달성.
이사회는 분기 현금배당을 주당 0.2925달러(연율 1.17달러)로 확정, 전년 동기 대비 2% 인상.
분기말 순부채/Adjusted EBITDA 비율 3.8배로 건전한 재무구조 유지.

watchItems.text: LNG 수출(현 8 Bcf/d, 2028년 12 Bcf/d 목표)과 데이터센터 전력 수요라는 두 가지 구조적 성장 동력이 동시에 작동하고 있어, 장기 계약 수주 진행 상황이 핵심 모니터링 포인트다.
총 백로그 규모 650억 달러(650억 달러)를 바탕으로 한 자본 배분 규율과 내부 자금 조달 역량이 향후 배당 인상 지속성의 핵심 변수다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 kmi2025q48-kex991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 KINDER MORGAN REPORTS FOURTH QUARTER 2025 FINANCIAL RESULTS Achieves Record Annual Net Income and Adjusted EBITDA 2025 Earnings per share (EPS) 17% greater than 2024; Adjusted EPS up 13% HOUSTON, January 21, 2026 - Kinder Morgan, Inc.’s (NYSE: KMI) board of directors today approved a cash dividend of $0.2925 per share for the fourth quarter ($1.17 annualized), payable on February 17, 2026, to stockholders of record as of the close of business on February 2, 2026. This dividend is a 2% increase over the fourth quarter of 2024. KMI is reporting: • Fourth quarter net income attributable to KMI of $996 million versus $667 million in the fourth quarter of 2024. Adjusted Net Income Attributable to KMI, excluding Certain Items, primarily  Normalized numeric aliases: $996 million = 9억 9,600만 달러; $667 million = 6억 6,700만 달러; $866 million = 8억 6,600만 달러; $0.2925 = 0.2925달러; $1.17 = 1.17달러; $996 = 996달러; $667 = 667달러; $866 = 866달러.

the fourth quarter of 2024. • Adjusted EBITDA of $2,271 million, up 10% versus the fourth quarter of 2024. • Earnings per share (EPS) of $0.45, up 50% versus the fourth quarter of 2024; and Adjusted EPS of $0.39, up 22% versus the fourth quarter of 2024. “Few would have predicted that the war in Ukraine would soon be entering its fourth year,” said Executive Chairman Richard D. Kinder. “Throughout the conflict, the United States has been a vital guarantor of European energy security, as America continues to lead the world in exports of liquefied natural gas (LNG). Our company has been proud to play a key role in that leadership, delivering more than 40% of the natural gas feedstock to U.S. LNG facilities. “It is particularly gratifying to maintain leadership in our sector by staying true to our original vision: owning midstream energy assets  Normalized numeric aliases: $2,271 million = 22억 7,100만 달러; $2,271 = 2,271달러; $0.45 = 0.45달러; $0.39 = 0.39달러; 2,271 million = 22억 7,100만 달러.

contracts with creditworthy customers” Kinder continued. “I have no doubt that we will continue delivering strong growth, reliable performance, and sustained value for many years to come.” “Led by record-setting performance in our Natural Gas Pipelines business segment, the company delivered its highest ever fourth quarter and full-year net income attributable to KMI and Adjusted EBITDA. For the full year, net income attributable to KMI was 17% higher than 2024 while Adjusted EPS and Adjusted EBITDA were 13% and 6% higher than 2024, respectively,” said Chief Executive Officer Kim Dang. 1 “In the fourth quarter, we continued to internally fund high-quality capital projects while generating cash flow from operations of $1.7 billion and free cash flow (FCF) after capital expenditures of $0.9 billion, up 12% and 18%, respectively, from the prior year period. Our balance sheet remains  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.7 billion = 17억 달러; $0.9 billion = 9억 달러; $1.7 = 1.7달러; $0.9 = 0.9달러.

as we ended the quarter with a Net Debt-to-Adjusted EBITDA ratio of 3.8 times,” continued Dang. “Overall, total demand for natural gas is expected to grow by 17% through 2030, led by LNG exports. We have long-term contracts to move 8 billion cubic feet per day (Bcf/d) of natural gas feedstocks to LNG facilities, which is projected to grow to 12 Bcf/d by the end of 2028. We are also actively exploring more than 10 Bcf/d of opportunities to serve the natural gas power generation sector. “In the markets we serve, we expect robust growth in power demand in the coming years, driven both by population growth and data center siting. In fact, approximately 70% of future power demand from data centers under development is in states served by our assets. With more than 65,000 miles of natural gas pipelines connected to all major basins and demand centers, along with more than 700 Bcf of working  Normalized numeric aliases: 8 billion = 80억 달러; 65,000 million = 650억 달러.
